title: gnaphalium elongatum
intro: Gnaphalium elongatum, also known as Elongated Cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its elongated stems and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gnaphalium elongatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
